use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PARKINSON'S DISEASE, POST-ENCEPHALITIC PARKINSONISM, AND PARKINSONISM THAT MAY FOLLOW CARBON MONOXIDE INTOXICATION OR MANGANESE INTOXICATION

TREATMENT OF PARKINSONISM THAT MAY FOLLOW CARBON MONOXIDE INTOXICATION OR MANGANESE INTOXICATION
METHOD OF PROVIDING A THERAPEUTICALLY EFFECTIVE AND STABLE MEDIAN BLOOD PLASMA LEVEL OF LEVODOPA

indications.text:
RYTARY is indicated for the treatment of Parkinson's disease, post-encephalitic parkinsonism,
and parkinsonism that may follow carbon monoxide intoxication or manganese intoxication.
